title: Create: Enlightend
description: Adds crushed ore compatibility with Enlightend, bringing new items and recipes for Create.
body:
About

This mod adds compatibility between Create and Enlightend by adding crushed variants of Bismuth and Irradium, as well as many new recipes including crushing, smelting and blasting recipes for all ores from Enlightend. 

Media

New crushed items (Bismuth)

New crushed items (Irradium)

Malachite Ore processing

Bismuth Ore processing

Irradium Ore processing

Adamantite Node processing

Full recipe list

Show spoiler

Crushing Malachite Ore
- x2 Malachite
- x1 Malachite (25% chance)
- x1 Create Experience Nugget (75% chance)
- x1 End Stone (12.5% chance)

Crushing Bismuth Ore
- x2 Crushed Raw Bismuth
- x1 Crushed Raw Bismuth (25% chance)
- x1 Create Experience Nugget (75% chance)
- x1 End Stone (12.5% chance)

Crushing Irradium Ore
- x2 Crushed Raw Irradium
- x1 Crushed Raw Irradium (25% chance)
- x1 Create Experience Nugget (75% chance)
- x1 End Stone (12.5% chance)

Crushing Adamantite Node
- x7 Adamantite Nugget
- x1 Adamantite Nugget (75% chance)
- x1 Create Experience Nugget (75% chance)

Smelting Crushed Raw Bismuth
- x1 Bismuth Ingot (200 ticks)
- 1.0 Experience

Smelting Crushed Raw Irradium
- x1 Irradium Bar (200 ticks)
- 1.0 Experience

Blasting Crushed Raw Bismuth
- x1 Bismuth Ingot (100 ticks)
- 1.0 Experience

Blasting Crushed Raw Irradium
- x1 Irradium Bar (100 ticks)
- 1.0 Experience

Dependencies

You must install both Create and Enlightend for this mod to work.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the Modrinth launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
